summary: A short vertical video, posted by a U.S. Border Patrol San Diego account, shot through what appears to be binoculars or a scope (a circular vignette frames the image). It shows a hillside in rugged terrain where the steel border barrier runs along a ridge, and a controlled blast throws up plumes of dust and debris along a dirt road being cut into the slope. The audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Through a circular scope vignette: a steel border barrier runs along a green and brown ridgeline; a controlled blast sends a column of dust and debris up from the hillside below it.
A wider blast along the same slope throws multiple dust plumes near the barrier as a road is cut into the terrain.
